summary: Re-test of iteration_8 fixes — all 4 fixes verified. Backend 24/24 pytest pass (regression clean). Frontend playwright verified: (1) hard-refresh on /account/subscription shows 'My subscription' h1 with 2 sub-block-* + 2 sub-cta-* in DOM and no /login redirect, (2) /premium/course renders course-player for admin, (3) /premium/book renders download-book-btn for admin, (4) /dashboard/arbitrage renders scanner (no gate), (5) /pricing shows pricing-card-arbitrage_bot + pricing-card-premium_3in1 + 2 subscribe-btn-*, (6) Admin → Subscriptions tab now displays admin row as 'Active · 29d' for BOTH Premium and Arbitrage columns (was Inactive/Inactive in iteration_8). Backend /api/admin/users returns paginated dict with subscriptions.{premium,arbitrage}.active=true for admin. Duplicate GET /admin/users at server.py:2168 confirmed deleted (line 2168 is now a PUT route only).

issues: One React warning remaining: 'React does not recognize the backgroundColor prop on a DOM element. ... spell it as lowercase backgroundcolor instead.' This is UNRELATED to Card3D — it is caused by a styled/motion component receiving a camelCase HTML attribute (likely a div with style={{backgroundColor}} being spread improperly, or a motion prop forwarded to DOM). Reduced from 2 warnings (iter_8) to 1 (iter_9) after Card3D rest-spread fix. Low priority; functional behavior unaffected.

action_items: OPTIONAL (LOW): Track down the remaining 'backgroundColor → backgroundcolor' React warning. Search App.js for a component spreading camelCase style props onto a DOM/motion element (likely a non-styled wrapper around <div style={{backgroundColor: ...}} /> being passed as raw attribute, or an animate/initial object inadvertently spread).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/admin/users now returns paginated dict {users, total, page, page_size} — frontend already consumes data.users in AdminSubscriptionsPanel. Good.
Card3D ({...rest} spread to motion.div) correctly propagates data-testid for pricing-card-*, sub-block-*, sub-cta-*. Confirmed in DOM during playwright run.
Auth-loading guard in PremiumGate + SubscriptionAccountPage works: hard-refresh on protected routes no longer redirects to /login. authLoading from AuthContext used correctly.
Reminder from iter_8 still valid: App.js is 6298 lines and server.py is large — extract pages into modules when feasible. Not a blocker.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (6/6 test scenarios — account/subscription, premium/course, premium/book, dashboard/arbitrage, pricing, admin subscriptions tab)

seed_data_creation: Existing TEST_phase1_* users from iter_8 still in DB (18 users in admin Subscriptions panel). New TEST_phase1_<timestamp>@example.com user created by pytest run + cleaned grant/revoke. No new seed beyond regression test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 confirms all 4 iteration_8 bugs are fixed. Backend regression: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_phase1_subscriptions.py -v. The only outstanding cosmetic item is a single React DOM-prop warning about 'backgroundColor' — does not affect functionality. Phase 1 is functionally complete and ready for next feature.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — re-test verifying iter_8 fixes. All 4 fixes applied correctly: Card3D now spreads {...rest} (App.js:250), PremiumGate (App.js:6005) and SubscriptionAccountPage (App.js:5941) use authLoading guard from AuthContext, legacy GET /admin/users duplicate removed (only line 1553 has GET; line 2168 is PUT), AdminSubscriptionsPanel reads u.subscriptions.{premium,arbitrage}.active correctly (admin row shows Active · 29d twice).
